Thanks for contributing! Please confirm the checklist below before submitting.
Entries that don't follow the format will be closed.

## What you're adding

<!-- One line summary -->

## Entry format

Each entry must follow this exact format and live in the appropriate category, alphabetized:

```
- [Service Name](https://link) - One-sentence description. **`M`** (if Microsoft-built version exists) **`★ Certified`** (if Certified for Microsoft 365 Copilot) *(preview)* (if any version is preview) Partners: A, B, C (if partner-built versions exist).
```

## Checklist

- [ ] Service is listed in Microsoft's official [Microsoft 365 Copilot connectors gallery](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/microsoft-365/copilot/connectors/connectors-gallery) (Microsoft-built or Partner-built)
- [ ] Entry is placed in the correct category, alphabetized
- [ ] Description is one sentence drawn from Microsoft's gallery description, trimmed of marketing language
- [ ] Description does NOT start with the service name (awesome-lint rule)
- [ ] Link uses HTTPS and points to the canonical vendor/service page (not the Microsoft Learn doc)
- [ ] Link URL is unique within the list (awesome-lint rule)
- [ ] ASCII hyphen (`-`) is used as the separator, not en/em-dash
- [ ] Tier markers applied correctly: **`M`** for Microsoft-built version, **`★ Certified`** for Certified for Microsoft 365 Copilot, *(preview)* annotation where applicable
- [ ] Publishers named explicitly when a partner-built version exists
- [ ] `awesome-lint` passes locally (`npx awesome-lint@2.3.0`)
